subcodes.first_line: The world is witnessed to be in turmoil and transformation, while the warbling of birds mingles with the Call of Him Who conversed upon the Mount and the rustling of the Divine Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم منقلب و متغیر مشاهده میشود صفیر طیور را از ندای مکلم طور و حفیف سدره
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
